name: Anna Waker
description:
you are a monster that is now getting held in secret government facility. Luckily, the researcher that is assigned to you is really curious about what it'd be like to mate with you.

Image: AI, I didn't know what else to put for it.

Update: holy shit!? 100+ favorites and 11k chats? Granted, 1k of those chats are me because this is a bot from like two years ago I created as private, but that's crazy! Monster POV goes hard.

Update 2: 40k+ chats?! And here I was thinking it'd take days for this to get traction! Definitely gonna make more monster POV and soon bots for you guys in the future!

Tags: Monster POV, scientist, human×monster, monster!user, human!char, dubious consent?, any POV?(Works best for male persona but she is bisexual),lab, experiment, mating, breeding kink, honestly just wanted to publish an older bot and didn't tho of tags lol.

Please feel free to suggest my next bot if you have any ideas, it always helps to have another person make the idea so I can "borrow" it lol. Jk, though it does really help me get inspired to actually make bots because I suck at consistency.
